name: Pipes
author: Poki
description: Pipes is a puzzle game made by Infinity Games. In this game you will need to move around pipes to complete a closed circuit for water to flow into the plants. Click on the pipes to rotate them ! This game has a ton of levels that and difficulty scales pretty fast ! Will you be able to finish all the levels ? How to play Pipes Mouse click - Rotate a pipe Who created Pipes ? Pipes was created by Infinity Games. How can I play Pipes on PC or mobile? You can play Pipes on your browser or on mobile without installing or downloading anything for free on Poki .
